meta.title: Nuclear Security Summits: Impact and Assessment
meta.description: The explosion of one crude nuclear device in one city would change our world forever. Since the end of the Cold War, a serious effort has been under way to fully secure the world's nuclear material. But 20 years later, that has yet to be achieved and the new threat of nuclear terrorism has emerged. Participants will discuss the impact of Nuclear Security Summits;, developments in nuclear security since the 2010 summit in Washington, DC; and look ahead to desired outcomes from the next Nuclear Se
